title: nannoglottis hieraciphylla
intro: Nannoglottis hieraciphylla, also known as the lesser celandine, is a perennial plant with yellow flowers that belongs to the family Berberidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Nannoglottis hieraciphylla include treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as exhibiting antiseptic and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
